details.productUrlName: Gary the Snail Toxrill the Corrosive

customAttributes.description:
SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom

At the beginning of each end step, put a slime counter on each creature you don't control.
Creatures you don't control get -1/-1 for each slime counter on them.
Whenever a creature you don't control with a slime counter on it dies, create a 1/1 black Slug creature token.
UB, Sacrifice a Slug: Draw a card.

details.productName: Gary, the Snail - Toxrill, the Corrosive

formattedAttributes.Description:
SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom

At the beginning of each end step, put a slime counter on each creature you don't control.
Creatures you don't control get -1/-1 for each slime counter on them.
Whenever a creature you don't control with a slime counter on it dies, create a 1/1 black Slug creature token.
UB, Sacrifice a Slug: Draw a card.
formattedAttributes.TCGplayer Tip: SpongeBob’s loyal pet Gary the Snail makes his MTG debut as Toxrill, the Corrosive in the SpongeBob Secret Lair! Toxrill is one of the saltiest cards you can play in Commander, making it very hard for your opponents to play any creature based strategies while it’s on the battlefield.
